# nios_microsoft_msserver (Resource)

Manages a Microsoft Server.

## Example Usage

```terraform
// Manage Microsoft Server with Basic Fields
resource "nios_microsoft_msserver" "msserver_basic" {
  address    = "10.10.0.1"
  login_name = "example_login"
}

// Manage Microsoft Server with Additional Fields
resource "nios_microsoft_msserver" "msserver_with_additional_fields" {
  address    = "10.10.0.2"
  login_name = "example_login2"

  // Additional Fields
  comment                   = "Example Microsoft Server"
  synchronization_min_delay = 5

  //Extensible Attributes
  extattrs = {
    Site = "location-1"
  }
}

// Manage Microsoft Server with AD Sites
resource "nios_microsoft_msserver" "msserver_with_ad_sites" {
  address    = "10.10.0.3"
  login_name = "example_login3"

  // Additional Fields
  comment                   = "Example Microsoft Server"
  synchronization_min_delay = 5

  ad_sites = {
    login_name                    = "example_login4"
    use_login                     = true
    synchronization_min_delay     = 10
    use_synchronization_min_delay = true
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `address` (String) The address or FQDN of the server.
- `login_name` (String) Microsoft Server login name, with optional domainname

### Optional

- `ad_sites` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--ad_sites))
- `ad_user` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--ad_user))
- `comment` (String) User comments for this Microsoft Server
- `dhcp_server` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--dhcp_server))
- `disabled` (Boolean) Allow/forbids usage of this Microsoft Server
- `dns_server` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--dns_server))
- `dns_view` (String) Reference to the DNS view
- `extattrs` (Map of String) Extensible attributes associated with the object. For valid values for extensible attributes, see {extattrs:values}.
- `grid_member` (String) eference to the assigned grid member
- `log_destination` (String) Directs logging of sync messages either to syslog or mslog
- `log_level` (String) Log level for this Microsoft Server
- `login_password` (String, Sensitive) Microsoft Server login password
- `ms_max_connection` (Number) Maximum number of connections to MS server
- `ms_rpc_timeout_in_seconds` (Number) Timeout in seconds of RPC connections for this MS Server
- `network_view` (String) Reference to the network view
- `read_only` (Boolean) Enable read-only management for this Microsoft Server
- `synchronization_min_delay` (Number) Minimum number of minutes between two synchronizations
- `use_log_destination` (Boolean) Override log_destination inherited from grid level
- `use_ms_max_connection` (Boolean) Override grid ms_max_connection setting
- `use_ms_rpc_timeout_in_seconds` (Boolean) Flag to override cluster RPC timeout

### Read-Only

- `ad_domain` (String) The Active Directory domain to which this server belongs (if applicable).
- `connection_status` (String) Result of the last RPC connection attempt made
- `connection_status_detail` (String) Detail of the last connection attempt made
- `extattrs_all` (Map of String) Extensible attributes associated with the object, including default attributes.
- `last_seen` (Number) Timestamp of the last message received
- `managing_member` (String) Hostname of grid member managing this Microsoft Server
- `ref` (String) The reference to the object.
- `root_ad_domain` (String) The root Active Directory domain to which this server belongs (if applicable).
- `server_name` (String) Gives the server name as reported by itself
- `synchronization_status` (String) Synchronization status summary
- `synchronization_status_detail` (String) Detail status if synchronization_status is ERROR
- `uuid` (String) Universally Unique ID assigned for this object.
- `version` (String) Version of the Microsoft Server

<a id="nestedatt--ad_sites"></a>
### Nested Schema for `ad_sites`

Optional:

- `default_ip_site_link` (String) Default IP site link for sites created from NIOS
- `ldap_auth_port` (Number) TCP port for LDAP connections for this
- `ldap_encryption` (String) Encryption for LDAP connections for this MS Server
- `ldap_timeout` (Number) Timeout in seconds for LDAP connections for this MS Server
- `login_name` (String) Microsoft Server login name, with optional
- `login_password` (String, Sensitive) Microsoft Server login password.
- `managed` (Boolean) Controls whether the Sites of this MS Server are to be synchronized by the assigned managing member or not
- `read_only` (Boolean) Enable/disable read-only synchronization of Sites for this Active Directory domain
- `synchronization_min_delay` (Number) Minimum number of minutes between two synchronizations
- `use_default_ip_site_link` (Boolean) Flag to override MS Server default IP site link
- `use_ldap_timeout` (Boolean) Flag to override cluster LDAP timeoutMS Server
- `use_login` (Boolean) Flag to override login name and password from the MS Server
- `use_synchronization_min_delay` (Boolean) Flag to override synchronization interval from the MS Server

Read-Only:

- `last_sync_detail` (String) The detailed status of the last synchronization attempt.
- `last_sync_status` (String) Status of the last synchronization attempt
- `last_sync_ts` (Number) Timestamp of the last synchronization attempt
- `supports_ipv6` (Boolean) Flag indicating if the server supports IPv6


<a id="nestedatt--ad_user"></a>
### Nested Schema for `ad_user`

Optional:

- `enable_user_sync` (Boolean) Determines whether the Active Directory user synchronization is enabled or not.
- `login_name` (String) The login name of the Microsoft Server.
- `login_password` (String, Sensitive) The login password of the DHCP Microsoft Server.
- `synchronization_interval` (Number) The minimum number of minutes between two synchronizations.
- `use_enable_ad_user_sync` (Boolean) Flag to override AD User sync from grid level
- `use_enable_user_sync` (Boolean) Use flag for: enable_user_sync
- `use_login` (Boolean) Flag to override login name and password from MS server
- `use_synchronization_interval` (Boolean) Use flag for: synchronization_interval
- `use_synchronization_min_delay` (Boolean) Flag to override synchronization interval from the MS Server

Read-Only:

- `last_success_sync_time` (Number) Timestamp of the last successful synchronization attempt.
- `last_sync_detail` (String) The detailed status of the last synchronization attempt.
- `last_sync_status` (String) The status of the last synchronization attempt.
- `last_sync_time` (Number) Timestamp of the last synchronization attempt.

Optional:

- `enable_invalid_mac` (Boolean) Enable Invalid Mac Address
- `enable_monitoring` (Boolean) Flag indicating if the DNS service is monitored and controlled

- `login_password` (String, Sensitive) Microsoft Server login password
- `managed` (Boolean) flag indicating if the DNS service is managed

- `synchronization_min_delay` (Number) Minimum number of minutes between two synchronizations
- `use_enable_invalid_mac` (Boolean) Override setting for Enable Invalid Mac Address
- `use_enable_monitoring` (Boolean) Override enable monitoring inherited from grid level
- `use_login` (Boolean) Flag to override login name and password from the MS Server
- `use_synchronization_min_delay` (Boolean) Flag to override synchronization interval from the MS Server

Read-Only:

- `status` (String) Status of the Microsoft DNS Service

- `supports_failover` (Boolean) Flag indicating if the DHCP supports Failover


<a id="nestedatt--dns_server"></a>
### Nested Schema for `dns_server`

Optional:

- `enable_dns_reports_sync` (Boolean) Enable or Disable MS DNS data for reports from this MS Server
- `enable_monitoring` (Boolean) Flag indicating if the DNS service is monitored and controlled
- `login_name` (String) Microsoft Server login name
- `login_password` (String, Sensitive) Microsoft Server login password
- `managed` (Boolean) flag indicating if the DNS service is managed
- `next_sync_control` (String) Defines what control to apply on the DNS server
- `synchronization_min_delay` (Number) Minimum number of minutes between two synchronizations
- `use_enable_dns_reports_sync` (Boolean) Override enable reports data inherited from grid level
- `use_enable_monitoring` (Boolean) Override enable monitoring inherited from grid level
- `use_login` (Boolean) Flag to override login name and password from the MS Server
- `use_synchronization_min_delay` (Boolean) Flag to override synchronization interval from the MS Server

Read-Only:

- `address` (String) MS Server ip address
- `forwarders` (List of String) Ordered list of IP addresses to forward queries to
- `last_sync_detail` (String) Detailled status of the last synchronization attempt
- `last_sync_status` (String) Status of the last synchronization attempt
- `last_sync_ts` (Number) Timestamp of the last synchronization attempt
- `status` (String) Status of the Microsoft DNS Service
- `status_detail` (String) Detailed status of the DNS status
- `status_last_updated` (Number) Timestamp of the last update
- `supports_active_directory` (Boolean) Flag indicating if the server supports AD integrated zones
- `supports_dnssec` (Boolean) Flag indicating if the server supports
- `supports_ipv6` (Boolean) Flag indicating if the server supports IPv6
- `supports_ipv6_reverse` (Boolean) Flag indicating if the server supports reverse IPv6 zones
- `supports_rr_dname` (Boolean) Flag indicating if the server supports DNAME records
- `supports_rr_naptr` (Boolean) Flag indicating if the server supports NAPTR records
